name_en: In Stock 22K New Backpack 🖤 AS3662 Patent Leather. Happiness level maxed out 😍 This is a hot item 🔥 The degree of being loved is obvious to all! Waiting for it with bated breath~ Finally got it~ This is simply a blessing for large bag lovers. The space inside is huge, and practicality is super strong 👍 The real thing is truly huge, huge, huge, huge, beautiful. Patent leather has its own luster, not as delicate as sheepskin, but lighter than grained cowhide. Predicted it will be the bag everyone loves this year 👋 It's really , sweet and cool yet retro, this backpack is the center of attention, the patent leather wind of this year, no one can escape 🫶🫶 Simply too addictive! Really explosively good!! (size: 31.5*31*9cm)
